briefs.title: Burnaby Council approves 2026–2030 Financial Plan and multiple city contracts
briefs.summary: At its January 27, 2026 meeting, Burnaby City Council voted on a range of items including a five-year financial plan bylaw, housing agreement changes, and several construction and service contracts totalling millions of dollars.
briefs.action_required: Review the 2026–2030 Financial Plan to see how new city spending or fees may affect your business.
briefs.industries: Construction & Development, Landlord & Property Mgmt, Transportation & Logistics
